runTitle: Vercel Production QA - AI Sidebar Cerebras Qwen Recheck

aiLatencyObservations.source: UI footer + browser Performance API + Cloud Run logs

expertAssessments.rationale: The simple summary path matched the dashboard, but the longer Cerebras-backed analysis surfaced a user-visible empty main answer.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Make provider quota failure produce a complete fallback answer in the main response, not only in the evidence panel.

expertAssessments.rationale: Production still serves v8.11.59 / 94f4dea, so the newer 198183658 query-as-of fix has not been validated on Vercel production.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Deploy the current GitLab HEAD through the release path before final production revalidation.

expertAssessments.rationale: Playwright MCP covered the real browser flow and Performance API captured EventSource stream entries.
The dashboard baseline and simple AI summary matched the same 16:30 KST slot values.

usageChecks.summary: Active period effective usage 19.0897 USD and billed usage 0.0000 USD; no cost spike before targeted production QA.

pendingImprovements.title: Deploy query-as-of metric slot fix to Vercel production
pendingImprovements.note: Production still reports v8.11.59 / 94f4dea, while the latest pushed fix is 198183658.

pendingImprovements.title: Prevent empty main AI analysis response when Cerebras queue or token quota fails
pendingImprovements.note: The analysis evidence panel contained useful detail, but the main assistant answer collapsed to only headings after Cerebras queue_exceeded/token_quota_exceeded failures.

notes: Targeted QA used a fresh Playwright browser after closing the stale locked MCP Chrome process.
Dashboard baseline: 16:30 KST slot 99/143, total 18, online 17, risk 1, cache-redis-dc1-01 MEM 92%.
Query 1 PASS: simple server summary matched dashboard values.
Query 2 FAIL: focused cache memory analysis had an empty visible main answer while analysis evidence contained details.
Cloud Run logs showed Cerebras Qwen queue_exceeded and token_quota_exceeded for the production path.

links.label: GitLab pipeline for currently deployed version
